implemented_functions.name: combination_count
implemented_functions.description: C(pool_size, pick_count) via math.comb — number of ways to choose k from n
implemented_functions.note: Replaces ad-hoc factorial calculations scattered across scripts

implemented_functions.name: single_ticket_probability
implemented_functions.description: P(≥ match_threshold matches) for one ticket — hypergeometric model
implemented_functions.note: Analytically exact; confirms 1.86% BIG_LOTTO, 3.87% POWER_LOTTO, 1.00% DAILY_539

implemented_functions.name: n_ticket_probability
implemented_functions.description: P(at least one of N tickets hits) = 1 - (1-p_single)^N
implemented_functions.note: Correct N-bet formula; L14 bug used per-ticket rate — this function is the fix

implemented_functions.name: expected_hits
implemented_functions.note: Pure arithmetic; used to sanity-check backtest result plausibility

implemented_functions.name: baseline_hit_rate
implemented_functions.description: Observed hit rate = n_hits / n_trials with bounds checking
implemented_functions.note: Validates inputs; replaces unchecked division in multiple scripts

implemented_functions.name: validate_lottery_config
implemented_functions.description: Validate config parameters; returns {valid, errors, warnings}
implemented_functions.note: Never raises — structured error return; call before any baseline computation

implemented_functions.name: random_baseline_summary
implemented_functions.description: Canonical structured baseline summary with no_edge_claim=True
implemented_functions.note: SSOT output schema; includes observed_hits comparison when provided

l14_fix_confirmed.description: L14 bug: per-ticket baseline used instead of N-ticket formula. n_ticket_probability() implements correct 1-(1-p)^N. validate_lottery_config() rejects invalid configs before computation.

final_decision: P252C complete. baseline_calculator.py SSOT implemented at lottery_api/utils/baseline_calculator.py. 7 pure-Python functions cover M4 null baseline gap from P252B. Reference values verified: BIG_LOTTO 1.86%, POWER_LOTTO 3.87%, DAILY_539 1.00%. L14 N-bet fix confirmed in n_ticket_probability(). No DB write. No registry mutation. No strategy promotion. No betting advice. Recommended next: P252D — implement M5 permutation_test.py SSOT (P0 priority).
